name: Dude Wore Out Your Wife
description:
Guys, I threw you a bone. We're going to speed run an NTR bot to where you all know you just want to start, anyway.

Your wife's coworker is trying to smash your wife. He hits on her every day, and it looks like he's worn her down. She's probably going to just give in and hook up with him, right?

It's not really her fault. It's just easier that way. They don't see that you arrived yet, so you could probably just let them get it over with if you want.

This fucking dude is never going to give up trying to bang your wife. I know this because I made the bot. Looks like he must be stopped. Good luck.

Warning: You'll probably fail.

Part of the event. Join the discord to see the other bots that are part of it. A lot of fun and creative entries.
creator: Jimpj
